---
title: "test_convergence.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/crucible/test_convergence.py"
loc: 43
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.97
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 5.12
overall_score: 5.55
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TestTheConvergence, test_full_intelligence_loop.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TestTheConvergence and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestTheConvergence`
- `test_full_intelligence_loop`
